description: We meet every Monday to explore the latest in neurotechnology — from brain-computer interfaces to neural signal processing. All experience levels welcome.

title: Intro to EEG Signal Processing
description: Hands-on workshop covering the fundamentals of EEG data acquisition, preprocessing, and spectral analysis using Python and MNE.

title: Past BCI Hackathon
description: Our inaugural hackathon where teams built motor imagery decoders.

name: Cortex BCI Pipeline
description: Real-time brain-computer interface processing pipeline for motor imagery classification using EEG signals.

name: Neural Signal Decoder
description: Deep learning model for decoding neural patterns from non-invasive EEG recordings with >85% classification accuracy.

name: Ani Chinthakindi
bio: Researching motor cortex signal decoding. Previously interned at Neuralink.

title: OpenBCI Cyton Guide
description: Comprehensive setup and troubleshooting guide for the 8-channel Cyton biosensing board.

title: Foundation
description: Establishing the core team, defining our research pillars, and building initial hardware prototypes for EEG acquisition.

title: Research Expansion
description: Launching 3 distinct R&D tracks, partnering with UVA neuroscience labs, and hosting our first hackathon.
